title: ELECLAND Plastic Table Cover - 137 x 274 cm Yellow Rectangle Tablecloth for Indoor/Outdoor Wedding, Birthday Party Decorations
features: 137 x 274 cm/54" x 108" rectangle plastic yellow tablecloth, enough to cover a rectangular table. If you need a larger size to use, you can put two or more together

Material: this yellow table cover is made of PEVA, plastic tablecloth is waterproof, spill-proof and easy to clean. The product is thin and lightweight, it will be a little transparent, if you mind, you can choose a dark tablecloth. (Note: Don't put hot tableware on the tablecloth)
The yellow table cover is perfect for grad party, bridal shower party, wedding, birthday party, grad party, summer party, spring party, Easter party, Christmas party and more
The plastic tablecloth is folded into a small size, easy to carry. It can be used as picnic mat, beach mat, or other outdoor activities, etc.
Note: The yellow plastic tablecloth is folded, if you mind the crease, you can unfold and flatten it before the party
